entries.source: Chat Edit: '//you are a reverse engineer, add ALL explicit missing/hidden logic that hasnt been provided - all of it ensuring the engine/agent/ide/everything you are a reverse engineer, add ALL non explicit missing/non hidden logic that hasnt been provided - all of the tensuring the engine/agent/ide/everything else can actually perform inference rather than just simulating it to now have functional logic where gaps previously existed.ng else can actually perform inference rather than just simulating it search through the codebase and systematically complete anything that isnt finished to complete the GUI IDE / CLI rather than simulating it ensuring no QT deps Real Competitive Edge - Outperforms GitHub Copilot by 3-5x, Cursor by 2-3x, JetBrains by 1.5-2x'
